creator: andros.ua@pm.me
text:
There is a problem with content of opencart/system/storage/vendor directory. Can be fixed by replacing content from github release.

Error from webserver:

FastCGI sent in stderr: "PHP message: PHP Warning:  require(/usr/local/www/opencart/system/storage/vendor/composer/../react/promise/src/functions_include.php): failed to open stream: No such file or directory in /usr/local/www/opencart/system/storage/vendor/composer/autoload_real.php on line 69PHP message: PHP Fatal error:  require(): Failed opening required '/usr/local/www/opencart/system/storage/vendor/composer/../react/promise/src/functions_include.php' (include_path='.:/usr/local/share/pear') in /usr/local/www/opencart/system/storage/vendor/composer/autoload_real.php on line 69" while reading response header from upstream
